full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 45 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 4 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. During RBC lysis incubation, transfered the cell suspension to a clean 50 ml falcon because the tube contained so much fat along the walls. Resuspended the pellet in 1 ml and aliquoted a 1:10 dilution for counting.

Cell counts:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 2.44 E6

live: 0.764 E6

viability: 31.4 %

size: 9.8 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 2.29 E6

live: 1.12 E6

viability: 48.7 %

size: 9.8 um

Average cell count/ml: 2.365 E6 cells/ml Total cell count: 2.365 E6 x10 = 23.65 E6 cells/ml

Total volume: 1 mL

Long-term organoid establishment

The average live cell count was 9.42 E6 cells/ml. Based on this, 0.4 E6 cells were calculated. Two aliquots, each containing 0.4 E6 cells, were prepared (i.e., 0.4 E6 cells per 10 droplets / one well). The cells were centrifuged at 300 g for 5 minutes and then resuspended in 200 µl of Cultrex solution. Each aliquot was used to make 10 droplets. The droplets were allowed to solidify for 45 minutes while the media was warmed. 3 ml of media was added to the droplets.

Freezing

15 E6 cells were aliquoted from the total cell suspension, suspension was centrifuged and resuspended in 3 ml StemCellBanker. Cell suspension was divided into three cryovials (each with 5 E6 cells).
